rows.goal: Hide the Delete button when the current user is not an admin.
Disable the email field unless the profile role is editor.
Only show the audit log link for users with role 'auditor'.
Show 'Approve' button only when the order status is 'pending' and the user has approver permission.
Render the export menu item only for users in the 'analytics' group.
Disable the 'Save Draft' button while the form is invalid OR a save request is in-flight.
Show a 'No results' empty state when the search returns zero items AND the query is not empty.
Require the 'CanApprove' policy on the Approve endpoint of the OrdersController.
Restrict the GET /reports endpoint so only users in the Manager role can list reports.
Show a warning banner if the user has unsaved changes and tries to navigate away.
